ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Continued To Dec-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing Application
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Teanna L. Ward, CSR#11918.

Lisa D. Dubowski, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB, a federal savings bank.
Walter Gibbs Custodian of Records for American Express sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Robert W. Steele, aka W. Robert, and individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $47,344.60
Prejudgment interest at the annual rate of 10 % $8,273.31
Costs $475.00 Attorneys Fees $2,825.00
for a total judgment in the amount of $158,917.91
Judgment signed.
